FIRST APPEARANCE FEE FILED BY DEFENDANT MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEM, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED THAT HE IS LIKELY TO PREVAIL, THE LEGISLATION DOES NOT GO INTO EFFECT UNTIL SEPTEMBER 8, 2008, AND THE LENDER, ALTHOUGH REQUIRED TO MEET, IS NOT REQUIRED TO AGREE TO THE BORROWER'S PROPOSED METHOD OF ADJUSTING THE DEBTS. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A STAY WAS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Goldberg of Bryan Cave (675.3425) for defendant and moving party
Alek Patek (818.398.1110) plaintiff and responding party in propria persona appearing via Court Call

Argued and the Court modified its ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEM, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Order signed after hearing. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Sep-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION

Appearances:
James Goldberg of Bryan Cave (675.3425) for defendant and responding party
Alek Patek (818.398.1110) plaintiff and moving party appearing in propria persona

Argued and the Court ruled as follows: denied. Plaintiff has not demonstrated that he is likely to prevail, the legislation does not go into effect until September 8, 2008, and the lender, although required to meet, is not required to agree to the borrower's proposed method of adjusting the debts. Plaintiff's request for a stay was denied. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction

RULING: Argued and the Court continues the matter to tomorrow (09/03/08). (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
